heading: Featured Work
subheading: Full-stack engineering across security, gaming, and enterprise

projects.title: SOC Workforce Management Platform
projects.description: Sole architect and engineer on a 0-to-1 greenfield platform integrating two enterprise systems — real-time case management for global security operations.
projects.scope: 30,000+ enterprises · 6 global SOCs · 5-second case claim time · Zero critical incidents post-launch

projects.title: Contact Centre & XDR Integration
projects.description: Post-acquisition integration bridging an enterprise contact centre and XDR security platform — solving a complex 3-hop cross-service identity chain.
projects.scope: 24/7 threat operations · Multi-platform identity resolution · Zero downtime deployment · DLQ-backed event pipeline

projects.title: Phishing-Resistant Auth Migration
projects.description: Migrated enterprise portal authentication from TOTP to FIDO2 hardware security keys — full WebAuthn implementation with phased 1%→100% rollout.
projects.scope: Zero user lockouts · Phishing exposure eliminated · Phased 1%→100% rollout · Legacy auth stack deprecated

projects.title: MDR Analyst Platform
projects.description: Architected a modular domain-driven React SPA for global security operations — Cases, Dashboards, Reports, and Users as independently owned modules.
projects.scope: 10M+ protected endpoints · 40% faster feature delivery · 6 global SOCs · Real-time analyst operations

projects.title: EA Play Social Platform
projects.description: Built real-time social features for EA Play and created the Cube test automation framework used across engineering teams.
projects.scope: Millions of subscribers · Real-time at scale · Internal framework adopted across teams · CI/CD pipeline integration

projects.title: Endpoint Security Mobile App
projects.description: Two years of production work on a cross-platform endpoint security application — protection workflows and device management across iOS and Android.
projects.scope: 10M+ device installs · iOS + Android · Protection workflows · Device management at scale
